sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  pageWrapper: "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 px-4 py-8",

  container: "max-w-6xl mx-auto space-y-6",

  header: "space-y-1",

  title: "text-3xl font-semibold text-slate-900",

  subtitle: "text-sm text-slate-500",

  pathWrapper: "text-sm mt-2",

  pathLink:
    "text-slate-500 cursor-pointer hover:text-black font-medium",

  pathActive: "text-black font-semibold",

  navbar:
    "flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  searchWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-100 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg w-full sm:w-64",

  searchInput: "bg-transparent outline-none text-sm w-full",

  sortSelect:
    "bg-slate-100 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm outline-none",

  addButtonDark:
    "inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-900 hover:bg-black text-white px-5 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition",

  submitButtonDark:
    "bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-black transition",

  form:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  input:
    "border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 outline-none",

  table:
    "bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 divide-y divide-slate-100",

  row:
    "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-6 py-4 text-sm hover:bg-slate-50 transition",
};
